YieldMax™ Launches “Industry First” Short N100 Option Income Strategy ETF (YQQQ)

holdings.infoBox: YQQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 20 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax Short N100 Option Income Strategy ETF (YQQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund aims to provide current income and inverse exposure to the NASDAQ 100 Index, with a cap on potential gains. The fund pursues its objective through an actively managed synthetic covered put strategy, using US Treasurys as collateral YQQQ was launched on Aug 14, 2024 and is issued by YieldMax.
